title: Standing questions store
description: The durable question store. Questions, not answers. Answers live in the rederive log (see rederive_entry.schema.json) and are treated as a disposable cache over the repo. The question text is human-owned: agents re-derive answers; they do not add, edit, or retire questions.

_note.description: Free-text reminder of the protocol for humans and agents reading the file raw.

id.description: Stable identifier. Never reused, even after the question is retired.

q.description: The question, phrased so it can be re-derived against current repo state — it should name or imply where ground truth lives.

importance.description: 3 = re-derive every session without exception; 2 = re-derive most sessions; 1 = re-derive when relevant or when stale.

status.description: Retired questions stay in the file for the audit trail; agents skip them.

evidence_hint.description: Optional pointer to where the answer is usually derived from (a path, a command). A hint, not a contract — re-derivation must follow current reality even when the hint goes stale.
